pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.13 to align with Java 17 and Spring Boot 3.x ecosystem.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires Java 17 as a baseline; using Spring Boot 2.x on Java 17 may lead to compatibility issues or missed features, and the migration recipe explicitly targets Spring Boot 3.3.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the managed Java version property from 11 to 17.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project targets Java 17; keeping the property at 11 would misconfigure tooling and dependencies that rely on this property for version resolution.
OpenCSV 2.8.6 is outdated and may not be compatible with newer Java versions or Spring Boot 3.x; upgrading ensures compatibility and access to bug fixes.
webjars-locator is deprecated/removed in newer Spring Boot versions; webjars-locator-core is the replacement artifact.

src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/viewem/con.general_idea: Replace deprecated Spring Security annotation with the new Java 17 compatible version.
src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/viewem/con.why_exists: EnableGlobalMethodSecurity is removed in Spring Security 6 (required for Spring Boot 3/Java 17), causing a compile error if not replaced.

src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/viewem/con.general_idea: Migrate servlet API imports from javax to jakarta namespace to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ requirements in Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/viewem/con.why_exists: ClassNotFoundException or NoClassDefFoundError at runtime because javax.servlet classes are no longer present in the classpath when running on Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3).

src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/viewem/mod.general_idea: Migrate JPA annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence namespace.
src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/viewem/mod.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3), causing compile errors for missing classes.

src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/viewem/mod.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile with 'package javax.persistence does not exist' errors on JDK 17 with Spring Boot 3.

src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/viewem/mod.why_exists: The javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code using these imports will fail to compile on JDK 17 with Spring Boot 3.

src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/viewem/rep.general_idea: Migrate JPA imports from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence to align with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/viewem/rep.why_exists: Classes in javax.persistence package are not found on the classpath in Spring Boot 3/Jakarta EE environments, causing compilation errors.

src/test/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/viewem/Lti.general_idea: Migrate HTTP client imports from legacy Apache HttpClient 4.x to Apache HttpClient 5.x (HC5) to align with Spring Boot 3 dependencies.
src/test/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/viewem/Lti.why_exists: Compile error: classes in org.apache.http package are removed or incompatible in the new dependency tree; code must use org.apache.hc.* packages.
